Object.Name: Cellular Connectivity Diagnostics
Object.Description1: Provides standardized diagnostic information about the current cellular connection, including serving cell identifiers, PLMN details, signal quality metrics, and SIM/eSIM parameters to support interoperability and troubleshooting.

Item.Name: MCC
Item.Description: Mobile Country Code (MCC) of the registered PLMN. ITU-T E.212: "The MCC consists of three decimal digits identifying the country of domicile of the mobile subscriber." (e.g., 262 = Germany). Range: 000-999.

Item.Name: MNC
Item.Description: Mobile Network Code (MNC) of the registered PLMN. ITU-T E.212: "The Mobile Network Code consists of two or three decimal digits and identifies the home PLMN of the subscriber within a country."(e.g., 01 = Telekom DE). Must be used together with MCC. Range: 00-999.

Item.Name: Serving Cell ID
Item.Description: Identifier of the serving cell. 3GPP TS 36.331/38.331: "CellIdentity: Identity of the cell, within the PLMN, in E-UTRA a 28-bit value (ECI); in NR a 36-bit value (NCI)." Range: LTE 0-268435455; NR up to 68719476735.

Item.Name: Tracking Area Code
Item.Description: Area Code identifying the UE’s registration area within a PLMN. Interpretation depends on the Network Bearer (Resource ID: 4): - GSM/UMTS (2G/3G): Location Area Code (LAC), 16-bit identifier of the Location Area. - LTE/NR (4G/5G): Tracking Area Code (TAC), 16-bit identifier of the Tracking Area. Both LAC and TAC are defined in 3GPP TS 23.003 and share the same numeric range (0-65535).

Item.Name: Network Bearer
Item.Description: Indicates the network bearer used for the current LwM2M communication session from the network bearer list below. The number range is split into three categories: 0 - 20 are Cellular Bearers 21 - 40 are Wireless Bearers 41 - 50 are Wireline Bearers More specifically: 0: GSM cellular network 1: TD-SCDMA cellular network 2: WCDMA cellular network 3: CDMA2000 cellular network 4: WiMAX cellular network 5: LTE-TDD cellular network 6: LTE-FDD cellular network 7: NB-IoT 8: 5G-NR TDD 9: 5G-NR FDD 10 - 20: Reserved for other types of cellular network 21: WLAN network 22: Bluetooth network 23: IEEE 802.15.4 network 24 - 40: Reserved for other types of local wireless network 41: Ethernet 42: DSL 43: PLC 44 - 50: reserved for other types of wireline networks.

Item.Name: Operator Name
Item.Description: Human-readable PLMN name of the registered operator. 3GPP TS 24.008: "The Network Name IE provides the PLMN name in either full or short form to be displayed to the user."

Item.Name: Roaming Status
Item.Description: Indicates whether the UE is on home (0) or visited (1) PLMN. 3GPP TS 23.122: "The MS indicates whether it is registered on its home PLMN or on a visited PLMN."

Item.Name: Frequency Band
Item.Description: Numeric identifier of the current operating band. 3GPP TS 36.101 Table 5.5-1: "The E-UTRA operating bands are designated by a Band Number (e.g., Band 1 = 2100 MHz)." For NR: 3GPP TS 38.101-1/-2.

Item.Name: RSRP
Item.Description: Reference Signal Received Power. 3GPP TS 36.214/38.215: "RSRP is defined as the linear average over the power contributions of resource elements carrying reference signals."

Item.Name: RSRQ
Item.Description: Reference Signal Received Quality. 3GPP TS 36.214/38.215: "RSRQ = (N × RSRP) / RSSI, where N is number of RBs."

Item.Name: RSSI
Item.Description: Received Signal Strength Indicator. 3GPP TS 36.214: "RSSI comprises the linear average of the total received wideband power observed at the antenna connector." GSM: TS 45.008; UMTS: TS 25.133.

Item.Name: SINR
Item.Description: Signal-to-Interference-and-Noise Ratio. 3GPP TS 36.214/38.215: "SINR represents the ratio of signal power to the sum of interference and noise power, expressed in dB."

Item.Name: EID (eUICC)
Item.Description: eUICC Identifier. GSMA SGP.22: "The eUICC Identifier (EID) is a 32-digit hexadecimal value that uniquely identifies an eUICC."

Item.Name: ICCID
Item.Description: Integrated Circuit Card Identifier. ITU-T E.118: "The ICCID is a unique identifier of the SIM, consisting of up to 20 digits."

Item.Name: IMSI
Item.Description: International Mobile Subscriber Identity. ITU-T E.212/3GPP TS 23.003: "The IMSI is composed of the MCC, the MNC and the MSIN, and uniquely identifies a subscription in a PLMN." Length: 14-15 digits.
